roa.docketEntryComment: SURRENDER
SURRENDER
DEFT OFFERS APOLOGY TO CRT & POLICE OFFICER,CLEMONS/J #259$200 REST PD IN FULL IN OPEN CRT,IN CASH(GIVEN TO CSR TO MAIL TO OFFICER W/ANY OF DEFT'S APOLOGY)

A/JWV;IN CAMERA HRG;CT2-245(A),2PC-SP2Y & ALLEG 12022,7-SP3Y=TOT-SP5Y/ESSCT3-417(B)PC-SP2Y/ESS C/C;ACTIONS#137868/138189 C/C;ALEG12022,5A-STAYEDCTS1,4,5 & 6-MO DISM BY DA;5YPROB;CTS198D;W/S;ALC CNSLNG-APD;NO WEAPONNOT ASSOC W/KNOWN CRIMINALSREST ALL VCTMS & 10%FEE;$100RF EA CT-STYD PENDING PYMNT REST;$25PC
MO BY DEFT TO W/D FORMER PLEA NG-GRTD;ADV/WVS CONST RTSPLD G CT2-245(A)2PC & CT3-417(B)PC;ADM ALEG12022,5APC-CTS2&3/12022,7-CT2CT MAKES FINDINGS
LIFT ESS-SP5Y;190CJ--94SAGE=CTS284D;VF1-$200 EA;BWR-10/31/94
BWR 103194;CONT TO 110394 S25 9AM FOR SAME
DEFT FTA;BW;NB;OR REVK
BW;OR REV'D-STAY 9/7/94 AT 845AM S25 FOR SURRENDER
DEFT PERS ADV MORRISEY/CONSTL RTS;DEFT WVS RT FOR HGCONT 8/31/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR SURRENDER/REMAND & SENT
CONT 7/13/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR HG MTR/DA
CONT TS OR DISPO 5/18/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR MTR/DA - HG
TRANSF TO D25 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 845AM IN D22
ADDNL CTS24D
CLERK REC'D $132 FOR REST;PROB CONT SAME T/C
CNSL APPTD;REF APD S/R TOBE FILED 5/27/93;REMANDED
MO 995PC DEN
DEEMED PRETRIED
CNSL APPTD;ARR;PLD NG EA CT W/ATTENDANT ALLEGS;CASH BAIL/PROP BOND EXONDEFT REMANDED
HTA, B/S $50,000 (C246061), MISD CERT TO SUP CT, 12025BPC/M STRICKENED
BAIL MOT RE PROPERTY GRANTED
AMD COMPLT FILED
